name: Median income single earner
description: Employee earning €35,000 annually. INPS contributions (3.19% after 6pp cuneo fiscale cut) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Benefits from 2026 rate reduction (33% vs 35%), employment tax credit with €65 bonus, and €1,000 fixed deduction.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation (TaxRaven)
2026 reduced rate (33% vs 35%) plus employment credit with €65 bonus
